topic: Sliding Window — When To Use It

scenes.narration: Yaar, Amazon ne mujhe Sliding Window — When To Use It pe yahi question poocha tha — 90% log yahi galat dete hain.
Without understanding Sliding Window — When To Use It, systems fail at scale. Here's why it matters.
Think of Sliding Window — When To Use It like a traffic cop at a busy intersection — directing flow efficiently.
The core mechanism of Sliding Window — When To Use It: it distributes work, manages state, and handles failures gracefully.
Key properties of Sliding Window — When To Use It: fault tolerance, horizontal scalability, and low latency.
Real-world example: companies like Netflix and Uber use Sliding Window — When To Use It to serve millions of users daily.
Quick recap: Sliding Window — When To Use It solves scale. Remember: distribute, monitor, and failover. That's the pattern.
